description: Configure a multi-architecture build pipeline using Docker Buildx and a local registry on port 5000. Create a bootstrapped Buildx builder using the 'docker-container' driver to build the Go application at /home/ga/edge-app/ for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 platforms. Push the resulting multi-architecture image to localhost:5000/edge-app:latest, ensuring the builder has the necessary network configuration to reach the registry.
